mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_notification (user_id, title, content, type, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{isRead})

INSERT INTO sys_notification (user_id, title, content, type, is_read) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.type}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE sys_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
